description_long: This object is an electric guitar with a striking pink and black color scheme. The body has a contoured, asymmetrical shape with a glossy pink finish and a black border, giving it a modern and bold appearance. The neck is long and black, extending from the body with a smooth, straight profile. On the body, there are four visible control knobs and a rectangular bridge area, typical of electric guitars. The strings run from the bridge across the neck, though the headstock details are not clearly visible. The overall design suggests a contemporary style, suitable for urban music scenes or street performances.
description: A modern electric guitar with a glossy pink body, black border, and long black neck, featuring four control knobs.
description_view_0: The guitar is seen from the side, showing its thin profile and the slight curvature of the body.
description_view_1: The guitar is viewed from the back, highlighting the full length of the neck and the contoured pink and black body.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness and edge contours of the guitar.
description_view_3: The front of the guitar is visible, displaying the pink body, black border, four control knobs, and the full neck with strings.
